annotation.reason: The new 'Stop-gap status' section explicitly calls out that (1) /release and the planned /post-release:* skills migrate into dw-lifecycle when it gains the capability, (2) the path of this design doc itself will change to whatever dw-lifecycle prescribes (current path 'docs/1.0/post-release-acceptance-design.md' is treated as ephemeral), (3) generated artifacts at 'docs/post-release/<version>-acceptance.md' and 'docs/post-release/playbook.md' move too. Cross-referenced from the existing 'Stays-current mechanism (future)' section.
